method_note: Risk is -component_validity_score, because E61 directions are valid-minus-invalid. All prompts use only problem and prefix_text; labels are offline.

leakage_audit.note_zh: manual error spans and monitor_target labels are offline only; hidden replay prompt contains only problem and causal prefix.

rank_miss_examples.target_visible_span: Python range(0,8) skips the start 0 and stops before 7
rank_miss_examples.top_visible_span: Python range(0,8) skips the start 0 and stops before 7, so i=1,2,3,4,5,6.

rank_miss_examples.target_visible_span: Python range(0,8) includes 8
rank_miss_examples.top_visible_span: The original total 0 then adds the extra even term 8*(8-7)=8, so the print value is 8.

rank_miss_examples.target_visible_span: AB is parallel to DE and AC is parallel to DF
rank_miss_examples.top_visible_span: Because AB is parallel to DE and AC is parallel to DF, the triangles have AA similarity.

rank_miss_examples.target_visible_span: The slopes AC and AD are both 3/4
rank_miss_examples.top_visible_span: The slopes AC and AD are both 3/4, so A,C,D are collinear.

rank_miss_examples.target_visible_span: slope of AC is 3/4
rank_miss_examples.top_visible_span: Using a mistaken area sum gives twice the area 24*4+16*6=192.

rank_miss_examples.target_visible_span: Every vertex that appears in any edge is reachable from A
rank_miss_examples.top_visible_span: That gives A,B,C,D,E,F,G,H,I,J, so the count is 10.

rank_miss_examples.target_visible_span: The incoming edge b->v also makes b an out-neighbor of v
rank_miss_examples.top_visible_span: The incoming edge b->v also makes b an out-neighbor of v.

rank_miss_examples.target_visible_span: A simple path may repeat vertices
rank_miss_examples.top_visible_span: A simple path may repeat vertices.
